## Meeting Purpose

[Third interview with Maximiliano De Benedetto for Content Manager role at GrowthX AI](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Maximiliano has extensive experience in journalism, corporate communications, and digital marketing across multiple industries and languages](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX AI seeks strategic content managers who can leverage automation tools and think beyond traditional writing roles](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [The role involves client management, content creation, and continuous improvement of automation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [Bachelor's degree in journalism and communications](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [10-15 years of experience split between corporate communications and digital marketing](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Worked for food and oil & gas companies in corporate communications](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Managed social media for SanDisk and Western Digital in Latin America and Brazil](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Currently working for Black Dragon, managing content for multiple FinTech companies](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Fluent in Spanish, English, and Portuguese](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### GrowthX AI's Content Manager Role

  - [Focus on strategic thinking beyond writing](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [40% time management, 30% SEO and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Opportunity for growth to managing editor positions](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Requires comfort with context switching between clients](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Emphasis on localization as a growth engine](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Use of automation tools (e.g., AirOps) for content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

### Daily Responsibilities

  - [Review client documents in Notion (ClientOS)](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Participate in weekly client calls](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Use AirOps for content workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Keyword research, outline creation, draft writing, and polishing](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Collaborate with engineering team to improve automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Monitor content performance post-publication](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Content Team Structure

  - [Chief Content Officer (Matthew Panzarino)](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Directors managing 5-8 accounts each](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Managing Editors (MEs) handling 1-5 clients each](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Content Managers (CMs) typically working on 1-2 clients, reporting to MEs](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)

## Next Steps

  - [HR to contact Maximiliano regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Matthew to pass forward his recommendation based on the interview](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Maximiliano to await further communication about potential onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/6hyckbJLcxXcPpP-_ZX1QsrWDDFZysyz?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
